title: What is the hebrew word for faith in the saying faith comes by hearing?
author: joshualinog
excerpt: # Passages - Rom 1:5 LEB through whom we have received grace and apostleship for the obedience of faith among all the Gentiles on behalf of his name, - Rom 1:17 LEB For the righteousness of God is rev
body:
# Passages
- Rom 1:5 LEB through whom we have received grace and apostleship for the obedience of faith among all the Gentiles on behalf of his name,
- Rom 1:17 LEB For the righteousness of God is revealed in it from faith to faith, just as it is written, “But the one who is righteous by faith will live.”
- Rom 10:17 LEB Consequently, faith comes by hearing, and hearing through the word about Christ.
- Gal 3:2-3 LEB 2 I want only to learn this from you: Did you receive the Spirit by the works of the law, or by the hearing of faith? 3 Are you so foolish? Having begun by the Spirit, are you now trying to be made complete by the flesh?
- Eph 4:20-24 LEB 20 But you did not learn Christ in this way, 21 if indeed you have heard about him, and you were taught by him (just as truth is in Jesus), 22 that you take off, according to your former way of life, the old man, who is being destroyed according to deceitful desires, 23 be renewed in the spirit of your mind, 24 and put on the new man (in accordance with God), who is created in righteousness and holiness from the truth.
Isa 59:14-17 LEB 14 And justice is pushed back,  and righteousness stands afar;  for truth stumbles in the public square,  and straightforwardness is unable to enter, 15 and truth is missing,  and he who turns aside from evil is plundered.  And Yahweh saw,  and it was displeasing in his eyes that there was no justice 16 And he saw that there was no man,  and he was appalled that there was no one who intercedes,  so his arm came to assist him,  and his righteousness was what sustained him. 17 And he put on righteousness like a breastplate,  and a helmet of salvation on his head,  and he put on garments of vengeance for clothing,  and he wrapped himself in zeal as in a robe.

# Connected to my study of ISAIAH 59 
- faithfulness came through Jesus Christ = 
- The earliest depiction line I said in my video to Rency that faithfulness himself, the spirit, the word came as the faithful intercessor

# simple interpretation 
- Jesus is faithfulness incarnate (WORD/SPIRIT) speaking, the voice of faithfulness itself speaking 
- earliest Church articulates the gospel a s this Encountering the Holy Spirit
content:
# Passages
- Rom 1:5 LEB through whom we have received grace and apostleship for the obedience of faith among all the Gentiles on behalf of his name,
- Rom 1:17 LEB For the righteousness of God is revealed in it from faith to faith, just as it is written, “But the one who is righteous by faith will live.”
- Rom 10:17 LEB Consequently, faith comes by hearing, and hearing through the word about Christ.
- Gal 3:2-3 LEB 2 I want only to learn this from you: Did you receive the Spirit by the works of the law, or by the hearing of faith? 3 Are you so foolish? Having begun by the Spirit, are you now trying to be made complete by the flesh?
- Eph 4:20-24 LEB 20 But you did not learn Christ in this way, 21 if indeed you have heard about him, and you were taught by him (just as truth is in Jesus), 22 that you take off, according to your former way of life, the old man, who is being destroyed according to deceitful desires, 23 be renewed in the spirit of your mind, 24 and put on the new man (in accordance with God), who is created in righteousness and holiness from the truth.
Isa 59:14-17 LEB 14 And justice is pushed back,  and righteousness stands afar;  for truth stumbles in the public square,  and straightforwardness is unable to enter, 15 and truth is missing,  and he who turns aside from evil is plundered.  And Yahweh saw,  and it was displeasing in his eyes that there was no justice 16 And he saw that there was no man,  and he was appalled that there was no one who intercedes,  so his arm came to assist him,  and his righteousness was what sustained him. 17 And he put on righteousness like a breastplate,  and a helmet of salvation on his head,  and he put on garments of vengeance for clothing,  and he wrapped himself in zeal as in a robe.

# Connected to my study of ISAIAH 59 
- faithfulness came through Jesus Christ = 
- The earliest depiction line I said in my video to Rency that faithfulness himself, the spirit, the word came as the faithful intercessor

# simple interpretation 
- Jesus is faithfulness incarnate (WORD/SPIRIT) speaking, the voice of faithfulness itself speaking 
- earliest Church articulates the gospel a s this Encountering the Holy Spirit
